home.title: PureCore Framework
home.subtitle: Enterprise-Grade Full-Stack Framework Built for Speed
home.description: PureCore is a high-performance, modular full-stack framework with elegant routing, automatic request validation, standardized response formatting, and built-in internationalization. Designed with developer experience at its core, it makes building robust, scalable API services simpler than ever.
home.feature_1_desc: Define groups, prefixes, and middleware through chainable calls — your route definitions are clear, concise, and self-documenting
home.feature_2_desc: A built-in automatic validation engine covers common rules out of the box, securing inputs with a single line of code
home.feature_3_desc: Frontend and backend share one set of language resources with automatic locale detection — zero configuration required
home.feature_4_desc: A unified JSON response structure with built-in pagination, error codes, and status codes ensures seamless frontend-backend collaboration
home.features_subtitle: From routing to responses, from validation to i18n — redefining the full-stack experience

notfound.title: Page Not Found
notfound.description: The page you are looking for does not exist or has been removed

cta.text: From backend APIs to frontend interfaces, PureCore delivers an efficient, all-in-one development experience. Start building your next project now.
